ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant (M/F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the participant */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the participant */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* General activity level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Any health conditions or notes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who earned the points */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the participant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the points were earned */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval for which the points were earned (e.g., 20-min, 1-hr) */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of physical activity (e.g., walking, running, cycling) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity was performed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was last updated */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the time_intervals table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_records_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_records_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES time_intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the time interval (e.g., 20-min, 1-hr) */,
  "interval_length" INTEGER /* Length of the time interval in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the time interval record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the time interval record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentage_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage change record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity record for which the percentage change is calculated */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in activity level within the time interval */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval for which the percentage change is calculated */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the time_intervals table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the percentage change record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the percentage change record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentage_changes_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES activity_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentage_changes_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES time_intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation period */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the participation period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the participation period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participation period (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "reason_for_completion" TEXT /* Reason for the completion of the participation period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participation period record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participation period record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_periods_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, Co-PI, Research Assistant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the research team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the research team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team membership */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team membership record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team membership record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data access log */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity record accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of data access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES activity_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity record checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of data quality check */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of data quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of data quality check (e.g., consistency, accuracy) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the data quality check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data quality check record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data quality check record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES activity_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integrity check */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity record checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of data integrity check */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of data integrity check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of data integrity check (e.g., consistency, accuracy) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the data integrity check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data integrity check record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data integrity check record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_checks_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES activity_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the system setting record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the system setting record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
